<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Seal a document with a legal entity signature"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/seal"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Uploading and affixing an electronic seal to a document takes just one call.


Additionally, you can place a visual signature on the document.


An API response from a seal request contains a document_id of the newly created
document with the seal that can be retrieved.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

</Heading>
